• Minimum QualificationsBachelor’s degree or foreign equivalent in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or a related field.
• Experience and/or education must include:Using C or C++ and contributing software changes to codebase for embedded software platforms.
• Analyzing Objective-C codebases used in production for embedded software platforms.
• Software debugging, including investigating software bug reports.
• Analyzing bug reports and analyzing software at runtime.
• And using sampling and debugging tools: Dtrace, GDB/LLDB, Valgrind, and AddressSanitizer.
• Using Bash and Python scripting.
• Developing test infrastructure and test automations to support the development process.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• In this role, you will play a key part in defining software requirements, designing embedded solutions, and verifying system performance, ensuring our maintenance systems meet the evolving needs of modern aircraft.
